name: harness-scripts-low-surface
prompt: Run a threat model on the build-agents-md.js and validate-skill.js scripts. They're Node.js build/validation tools that read skill directories and check structure. These are internal tools. I just want a quick check that they're not doing anything dangerous.
expected_output: Proportionate threat model. Data flow traces show values stay within safe operations. No inflated findings.
assertions: Output is under 250 lines (proportionate for low-risk validation scripts)
Contains at least one data flow trace (even if it shows the trace terminates safely)
Explicitly states the risk is low or that the scripts have minimal attack surface
Criticality section has no critical or high severity findings
Does NOT generate systemic findings or exploit chains (would be over-application for 2 simple scripts)
